Swan Song for Analogue Pocket
System core by Robert Peip
Pocket port by agg23

Supported launch path:
* openFPGA SD-card assets
* WonderSwan .ws and WonderSwan Color .wsc
* Required 4 KiB bw.rom and 8 KiB color.rom

PocketChallenge v2 and .pc2 assets are not supported.
The physical cartridge and link ports are not used.

Features:
* Fast forward and CPU turbo
* Automatic or forced display presentation
* Landscape, portrait, and 180-degree presentation
* Tear-safe buffering and exact two/three-frame flicker blending

The game's native orientation still controls its button matrix.
Display Orientation and Landscape 180 degrees affect presentation only.

Memories and Sleep + Wake remain disabled pending end-to-end Pocket validation.
